data.description: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $266.1 mln.

data.title: Evers & Sons achieves 1.9M safe man-hours and expands operations to 35 states, garnering industry safety awards in 2025.
data.description: Houston-based company Evers & Sons Inc. concluded 2025 with over 1.9 million safe man-hours. The company demonstrated strong performance in its Facilities, Fabrication, Pipeline, Maintenance, and Decommissioning & Asset Abandonment divisions. Additionally, they expanded their licensing to three more states, now operating in nearly 35 states. Evers & Sons supported midstream infrastructure projects across various US regions in 2025, involving both greenfield and brownfield projects.

data.title: Kent Worldwide launches WellJoy™, a pet wellbeing brand with treats and supplements. Family-owned with 100 years of expertise. 🐾
data.description: WellJoy™ has been unveiled by KENT WORLDWIDE™ in MUSCATINE, Iowa, on Jan. 15, 2026. With a legacy of 100 years in animal care and agricultural innovation, the family-owned business introduces WellJoy™ as a new line of pet products. The launch includes dual-benefit treats and supplements, offering a unique approach to pet nutrition.

data.title: MOVA Life unveils smart health ecosystem at Silicon Valley event, showcasing global growth strategy for 2026.
data.description: In San Jose, California on January 15, 2026, MOVA, a prominent smart technology brand, held its annual global strategy and product launch at AGI House in Silicon Valley. The event marked the introduction of a revamped brand identity and highlighted the company's growing smart health ecosystem, signaling its ambitious international expansion efforts.

data.title: RE/MAX acquires 2 Toronto brokerages, 17 offices, with over 1,200 sales associates and $3B in combined production value.
data.description: A well-known real estate family, overseeing a team of 1,200 sales associates and a combined brokerage production exceeding $3 billion, were drawn to a prestigious brand due to its international reputation, vast opportunities, leading national market share in Canada, and involvement in both luxury and commercial real estate sectors. This decision was made public in Denver in January.

data.title: Climate tech company ICT acquires Heat Transfer Systems of Georgia to expand in Southeast region.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Impact Climate Technologies (ICT) revealed its recent acquisition of Heat Transfer Systems of Georgia, situated in Alpharetta. The obtained company focuses on various HVAC equipment such as cooling towers, heat exchangers, boilers, and water filtration systems. This acquisition signifies a strategic move for ICT to enhance its offerings in the sector.

data.title: HOLYWATER secures $22M funding, led by Horizon Capital, to transform microdramas into mainstream entertainment in the US.
data.description: The tech company, HOLYWATER, based in KYIV, Ukraine and LISBON, Portugal, is revolutionizing global entertainment with its top products: My Drama for vertical series, My Passion for books, and My Muse for AI streaming. A recent milestone for the company is the completion of a successful financing round, closing at $22 million. Horizon Capital spearheaded the round, with additional contributions from prominent U.S. investors like Endeavor Catalyst and Wheelhouse. This investment marks the largest single funding round for HOLYWATER, showcasing confidence in the company's innovative offerings.

data.title: State Street introduces Digital Asset Platform for tokenized finance, bridging traditional & digital finance. Key services include tokenized MMFs, ETFs.
data.description: State Street introduced its new Digital Asset Platform in Boston today. The platform is a secure and scalable infrastructure designed for tokenized assets. This move positions State Street as a key intermediary between traditional and digital finance, facilitating connections between digital asset platforms for its clients. This foundational development is crucial for State Street's digital strategy, enabling the creation of core products, such as tokenized Money Market Funds (MMFs) and ETFs, for its clients.

data.title: Hopae appoints Sarah Clark as CPO & GM NA, to accelerate digital identity infrastructure globally.
data.description: Hopae, a leading global digital identity infrastructure company, has made a strategic move to bolster its presence in North America by appointing Sarah Clark as Chief. This development is significant for the company's expansion plans in the region. The appointment, made on January 15, 2026, signifies Hopae's ambitions to accelerate its growth and strengthen its position in the market. This decision is expected to have far-reaching implications on the company's operations, with Clark expected to play a crucial role in shaping its future strategies. This move comes at a time when Hopae is aiming to solidify its standing in the digital identity sector and tap into the North American market's vast potential.
GREER: U.S., HONDURAS INTEND TO LAUNCH NEGOTIATIONS OF A BILATERAL AGREEMENT ON RECIPROCAL TRADE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE -STATEMENT

data.title: NTSB states Boeing was aware of defects in UPS plane that crashed in Louisville. Left engine detached from wing due to fractures observed 4 times.
data.description: On Wednesday, the National Transportation Safety Board disclosed in a report that the left engine's separation from the plane's wing was caused by fractures that had occurred on at least four previous occasions.

data.title: Elon Musk's X restricts API for 'InfoFi' crypto after 'AI Slop' backlash. Preventing access to spam projects.
data.description: A notable announcement was made regarding X's API, highlighting significant adjustments that are being implemented to block entry for "InfoFi" crypto initiatives that encourage "reply spam." According to an executive, these changes are aimed at safeguarding the platform against such practices. This move signifies a proactive effort to maintain the platform's integrity and user experience.

data.title: 5 top surgeons launch Hand Wrist & Elbow Inst. at Midwest Orthopaedics at Rush with 7 practice locations.
data.description: In January 15, 2026, a team of five skilled orthopedic surgeons established The Hand, Wrist & Elbow Institute at Midwest Orthopaedics at Rush in Chicago. This institute operates across seven different locations. The founding surgeons are Mark Cohen, M.D., John Fernandez, M.D., Robert Wysocki, M.D., Xavier Simcock, M.D., and others.

data.title: New educational symposium series by SBCA in Austin, Texas to connect designers, architects, builders, and engineers. Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on January 15, 2026, the Structural Building Components Association (SBCA) revealed a groundbreaking initiative. They introduced an educational symposium series aimed at uniting professionals involved in designing, constructing, and overseeing structures within the construction sector. This series will address crucial aspects that currently lack alignment within the industry.

data.title: Kindeva announces leadership transitions for growth. A global CDMO & drug innovator aiming to accelerate growth.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Woodbury, Minnesota, Kindeva, a leading contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) and innovator in drug delivery, unveiled a strategic leadership succession plan to drive growth in its primary operations. The company aims to strengthen its market presence through these planned transitions, positioning itself for future expansion.

A car was vandalised following chaotic clashes in Minneapolis between authorities and civilians after a man was shot in a federal immigration operation on Wednesday (January 14), according to local media and authorities. A Venezuelan national was pursued by U.S. immigration

data.title: Mouser Electronics adds 40,000 new parts in 2025, works with 1,200+ brands, guarantees 100% genuine products.
data.description: In Texas, Mouser Electronics, Inc. operates as an authorized distributor, prioritizing the swift launch of new products and technologies to give customers a competitive advantage and accelerate time to market. With a portfolio of over 1,200 semiconductor and electronic component manufacturer brands, Mouser supports these companies in introducing their products worldwide. Mouser guarantees its customers access to 100% certified, authentic products that can be fully traced back to the manufacturer.

data.title: Hallmark Health Care Solutions introduces Resource Intelligence for health systems to optimize contingent labor sourcing.
data.description: Hallmark Health Care Solutions from Charlestown, Massachusetts, has revealed the launch of Resource Intelligence. This tool is designed to assist health systems in making quicker data-informed labor choices.
